creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
It just dawned on me that all four of my Raspberry Pi hosts equipped
with ftdi usb-serial adapters exhibit some form of odd behavior.
Usually, stray characters appearing after bringing up the connection
prevail. Just now, when the serial connection came up the usb end
displayed text that had accumulated following reboot, but typing
produced neither echo nor response. Using usbconfig to power cycle 
the ftdi usb-serial adapter got me an OK prompt from the remote host's
loader and it was possible to complete the remote host's boot.


This sort of trouble has been apparent for quite a long time, but
it seems to have gotten noticeably worse in the last month or two.
